description_long: This object is a single, thick slice of rustic bread with a dark, textured crust and a dense, porous interior. The crust is uneven and rugged, with a mottled brown coloration and visible air pockets, suggesting an artisanal or whole grain loaf. The top surface is rough and irregular, with a natural, hand-cut appearance and no uniformity in shape. The interior crumb is dense, speckled with small holes, and appears slightly moist, indicating a hearty, substantial bread. The edges are rounded and the slice is not perfectly rectangular, further emphasizing its handmade quality. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the surface.
description: A thick, rustic slice of dark bread with a rough, uneven crust and a dense, porous interior. The slice has a natural, hand-cut appearance and a mottled brown coloration.
description_view_0: The bread slice is seen from an angled top-down view, highlighting the rough, dark crust and the uneven, porous surface of the crumb.
description_view_1: This view shows the slice from a lower, more frontal angle, emphasizing the thickness of the bread and the dense, speckled interior.
description_view_2: The slice is viewed from the opposite side, displaying the rugged crust and the irregular, natural edge of the bread.
description_view_3: A side angle reveals the height and thickness of the slice, as well as the mottled texture of both the crust and the crumb.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is rugged and uneven, with a mottled brown coloration and visible air pockets. There are no seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring, giving it a natural, rustic appearance.
